title: Thai Crumble Nectarine Crisp
description: A twist on the classic crisp, this Thai-inspired dessert combines the sweetness of nectarines with a crunchy, buttery crumble topping.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together nectarines, granulated sugar, and ground cinnamon.
Transfer the nectarine mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together flour, brown sugar, and cold unsalted butter until crumbly.
Add sesame seeds and crunchy rice cereal to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Pour the crumble mixture evenly over the nectarine filling.
Drizzle coconut oil over the crumble topping.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Serve warm, topped with a scoop of vanilla ice cream if desired.
